arguments.command:
for pkg in "System.Text.Json" "Azure.Storage.Blobs" "Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" "Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" "Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" "OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" "xunit"; do
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/$( echo "$pkg" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' )/index.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load(sys.stdin)['versions'] if '-' not in v]; print(vs[-1])" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg -> $ver"
done

data.content:
Everything looks correct. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Centralized all versions in `Directory.Build.props`** — no more hardcoded versions scattered across project files. Every `PackageReference` now uses an MSBuild property.

**Packages bumped to latest stable:**

| Package | Before | After |
|---------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 | **10.0.7** |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 | **12.27.0** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | **10.0.7** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | **10.0.7** |
| NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.26** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | **1.15.3** |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | 2.9.3 (already latest) |
| NewtonsoftJson (net6.0) | 6.0.36 | 6.0.36 (already latest) |

The conditional multi-targeting for `NewtonsoftJson` in `Api.csproj` is preserved — net6.0 gets 6.0.36 and net8.0 gets 8.0.26, both via properties.
